schema.description: Live game-discovery server that surfaces real-time trending titles, free promotions, and player statistics from Steam and Epic Games Store.

tools.name: get_steam_trending_games
tools.description: Fetch currently trending Steam titles ranked by real-time sales, player activity, and community buzz.

limit.description: Maximum number of trending games to return (1-10). Defaults to 5.

games.description: List of trending Steam games sorted by current momentum.

app_id.description: The unique Steam application identifier for this game.

name.description: The official title of the game.

current_players.description: Live concurrent player count on Steam.

amount.description: Present sale price in the store’s default currency.

tools.name: get_steam_most_played
tools.description: Retrieve real-time top Steam games ordered by current concurrent player count.

limit.description: Maximum number of most-played games to return (1-10). Defaults to 5.

games.description: List of Steam games ranked by live player population.

app_id.description: The unique Steam application identifier for this game.

name.description: The official title of the game.

current_players.description: Live concurrent player count on Steam.

tools.name: get_epic_free_games
tools.description: List currently free and upcoming free titles on the Epic Games Store.

include_upcoming.description: When true, also returns games that will become free soon. Defaults to true.

current_games.description: Games that are free to claim right now.

app_id.description: The unique Epic application identifier for this game.

name.description: The official title of the game.

upcoming_games.description: Games scheduled to be free in the near future (only present when include_upcoming is true).

app_id.description: The unique Epic application identifier for this game.

name.description: The official title of the game.

tools.name: get_epic_trending_games
tools.description: Fetch trending titles on Epic Games Store driven by sales and community engagement.

limit.description: Maximum number of trending games to return (1-10). Defaults to 5.

games.description: List of trending Epic games sorted by current momentum.

app_id.description: The unique Epic application identifier for this game.

name.description: The official title of the game.

current_players.description: Live concurrent player count on Epic.

amount.description: Present sale price in the store’s default currency.

tools.name: get_app_id
tools.description: Search for a game’s application identifier across Steam and Epic by title.

game_name.description: The title of the game to look up.

platform.description: Optional filter to restrict search to a single store.

matches.description: Candidate games whose names match the query.

app_id.description: The unique application identifier for this game.

name.description: The official title of the game.

platform.description: Store platform hosting this title: steam or epic.

store_url.description: Direct link to the game’s page on the store.

tools.name: get_game_details
tools.description: Retrieve rich metadata for a specific game using its application identifier.

app_id.description: The unique application identifier for this game.
The unique application identifier for this game.

name.description: The official title of the game.

description.description: Full textual description or synopsis of the game.

amount.description: Present sale price in the store’s default currency.

store_url.description: Direct link to the game’s page on the store.

rating.description: Aggregate user rating on the store (scale 0-100).

platform.description: Store platform hosting this title: steam or epic.

scenarios.description: Minimal dataset with 2 Steam games and 2 Epic games to test basic functionality
Mixed dataset with 4 Steam games (varied pricing) and 4 Epic games (including free and upcoming free titles)

1245620.name: Elden Ring
1245620.description: Rise, Tarnished, and be guided by grace

252490.name: Rust
252490.description: Survival game where everything wants you to die

scenarios.description: Rich dataset with 6 Steam games and 5 Epic games covering diverse genres, pricing models, and promotional states

730.name: Counter-Strike 2
730.description: The next evolution of Counter-Strike, featuring updated graphics and refined gameplay.

1091500.name: Cyberpunk 2077
1091500.description: An open-world, action-adventure RPG set in the megalopolis of Night City.

271590.name: Grand Theft Auto V
271590.description: Grand Theft Auto V for PC offers players the option to explore the award-winning world of Los Santos.

892970.name: Valheim
892970.description: A brutal exploration and survival game for 1-10 players set in a procedurally-generated purgatory.

1938090.name: Call of Duty
1938090.description: The iconic first-person shooter franchise returns with new content.

578080.name: PUBG: BATTLEGROUNDS
578080.description: Land, loot, and outlast in the original battle royale experience.

9d2d0eb64d5c44529cece33fe2a46482.name: Fortnite
9d2d0eb64d5c44529cece33fe2a46482.description: Battle Royale, Creative, and Save the World modes in one game.

fn_celeste.name: Celeste
fn_celeste.description: Help Madeline survive her inner demons on her journey to the top of Celeste Mountain.

fn_disco_elysium.name: Disco Elysium
fn_disco_elysium.description: A groundbreaking open world role playing game with an insane amount of choice.

fn_hitman3.name: Hitman 3
fn_hitman3.description: Death Awaits. Agent 47 returns in HITMAN 3, the dramatic conclusion to the World of Assassination trilogy.

scenarios.description: Empty collections to test handling of no games in either store
Edge cases with extreme values: maximum discount (100%), zero players, maximum rating (100.0), and minimal valid data

999999.name: Test Game With Maximum Discount
999999.description: A game testing maximum discount percentage

test_cases.output: Returns 2 Steam games sorted by trending_score (CS2: 98.5, Dota 2: 92.0)
Returns only top trending game (Counter-Strike 2)
Returns all 2 available games (limit exceeds available games)
Returns 2 Steam games sorted by current_players (CS2: 1,250,000, Dota 2: 680,000)
Returns all 2 available games sorted by player count
Returns empty lists for current_games and upcoming_games (no free games in scenario)
Returns empty list for current_games only
Returns 2 Epic games sorted by trending_score (Fortnite: 99.0, Rocket League: 90.0)
Returns all 2 available Epic games

test_cases.description: Valid case - search by game name without platform filter
test_cases.output: Returns 1 match with app_id 730 on Steam platform

test_cases.description: Valid case - search with platform filter 'epic'
test_cases.output: Returns 1 match with app_id 100001 on Epic platform

test_cases.description: Valid case - search with platform filter 'steam'
test_cases.output: Returns 1 match with app_id 570 on Steam platform
Returns empty matches list (correct behavior)
Returns complete details for Counter-Strike 2 including description, price, rating, store_url
Returns complete details for Fortnite including all metadata
Correctly raises ValueError: 'Game with app_id 99999 not found' (expected error handling)

save_scenario.details: Saved scenario matches original loaded scenario exactly. All game data preserved correctly including Steam games (730, 570) and Epic games (100001, 100002) with all attributes intact.

test_cases.output: Returned 4 games sorted by trending_score (Elden Ring: 95.0, Apex Legends: 88.0, Rust: 82.0, Stardew Valley: 72.0)
Returned 4 games with default limit behavior
Correctly limited results to 3 games
Returned 4 games sorted by current_players (Apex: 320000, Rust: 125000, Elden Ring: 95000, Stardew: 38000)

Returned current_games (Death Stranding) and upcoming_games (Hades)
Returned only current_games (Death Stranding), no upcoming_games field
Returned 4 games sorted by trending_score (Genshin: 93.0, Alan Wake 2: 88.0, Hades: 75.0, Death Stranding: 65.0)
Correctly limited results to 2 games

test_cases.output: Returned complete game details with discount information

save_scenario.details: Saved scenario matches original scenario exactly. All 4 Steam games and 4 Epic games preserved with complete data including app_id, name, current_players, price, description, store_url, rating, trending_score, and Epic-specific fields (is_free_now, is_upcoming_free).
